message.body: Lego City Undercover guy playing spike game 😱
I love how Lego City Undercover has practically declared independence from the rest of the Lego game community.
i cant even beat gur hard mode lmao
theres no "you like rex do you?" so bad game
and also take off the goals
i dont want to play clubstep
deadlocked is easier then clubstep imo
i just got 87% on the nightmare
i beat deadlocked in 600 attempts and i spent 2.6k on clubstep
what demon should i go for after
yh dude a jump from easy demon to extreme demon
i got tidal line in 6 runs
i have 99% on future funk lmao
i think the best extreme demon to start with is sweather weather
i played it for like 20 mins and got 72%
i used to actually hear it
nah i thought it was romantic lmao
what wrs are you happy with
undercover will never be killed cuz xbox has sa launch load manip and tis punch
Is this language faster for dialogue or something?
i want miikeyy to get a mic
if he gets miced up it would be pog
i think you overshot it wizard
miikeyy after all im not touching you
CHANGE OF PLANS! let’s get the record for longest LCU speedrun.
loopy was talking bad about the lcu community
saying we "drifted apart the lego speedrun community"
and also sied said lcu community found recently something that could also be used in other lego games
Forrest Blackwell deserved his own ability.
and when i asked him what was that new thing he said it was a secret
“If Lego games are known for anything, they’re known for how many they pumped out since 2005, but besides they are also known for their studs”
mf sounded like Timothée Chalamet when he was asked if he was esdeekid
"it will all be reveled in due time"
Unleash a plague on the Lego game speedrunning community, it’d be very funny 🤭
what i told loopy is lcu deserved to have its own server
our game has fucking nothing to do with other lego games
A skip that only works once your computer blows up
even tho the movies that lego was inspired by are peak
So, where should we start the plague?
Wait, is LCU declaring war on the Lego game community?
i love the lego speedrun community
but loopy saying we drifted apart for no reason isnt true
i think every game should have its own fucking server
it was much better cause having its own server made the community much more activer
Frank Honey is Forrest Blackwell, they’re never seen together.
"herm actually there is a drop out warp in lb3 and other lego games"
if you drop out and then you drift the camera and drop back in it clips you in
wich is kinda what we do in lcu
I still think it’s a missed opportunity that the two player character wasnt Frank Honey.
I love how Chase McCain can just turn into a different person.
dude all there is in the lcu channel is glitchy and trent showing bricks
I’m Chase McCain, I wanna become the British guy.
Unless you call gang fights boss fights.
Forrest Blackwell deserved a boss fight, violets are blue, roses are red.

New any% route: after clown 1 get farmer and lock it by arresting clown 2, then pizza truck launch to the helipad to fly to apollo island Faster bc it removes the need to cross auburn bay bridge again Found by wizardpower
He takes off his space suit then jumps out.
this was absolutly insane to know and NOBODY even answered back the fucking new route
He would probably suffer brain damage.
@alexisverytuff execute Forrest Blackwell with the electric chair.
even tho we thought of killing chief dunby
i had school today so i woke up at 7am but my school was closed
Edits wouldve had a field day if this game was literally New York City or had it in one district.
it was going to be like 10:50 farmer
your only time save is police station lmao

I’M GOING TO ARREST YOU FOR A BANK ROBB- *gets arrested*.
do you think you can actually do 100% coop in the summer?
“I AM BEING ABDUCTED, AGAINST MY WILL!”
we just need to ACTUALLY get 100%
oh true you also didnt get this door first try
so you can save time in police station and fmttm entrance

nah you hit the door at 17:04

and i said it in the freefall
Stones, shall not hurt me? *gets hit by a stone and dies*

damn wizard you be seeing weird stuff
Did you take those mushrooms in the forest, Blackwell, California?

25 is how much he CAN save
